inputs.label: Point Size (pt)
inputs.businessContext: Font size in points, typically used in print design.

businessContext_i18n.en: Font size in points, typically used in print design.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Punto cinsinden font boyutu, genellikle baskı tasarımında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schriftgröße in Punkt, typisch für Druckdesign.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille de police en points, généralement utilisée en conception imprimée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño de fuente en puntos, típicamente usado en diseño de impresión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم الخط بالنقاط، يُستخدم عادةً في تصميم الطباعة.

inputs.label: Base Font Size (px)
inputs.businessContext: Reference pixel size for relative conversions (e.g., em/rem).

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference pixel size for relative conversions (e.g., em/rem).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Göreli dönüşümler için referans piksel boyutu (örn. em/rem).
businessContext_i18n.de: Referenz-Pixelgröße für relative Umrechnungen (z. B. em/rem).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille de pixel de référence pour les conversions relatives (ex. em/rem).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño de píxel de referencia para conversiones relativas (p. ej., em/rem).
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم البكسل المرجعي للتحويلات النسبية (مثل em/rem).

inputs.label: Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for responsive scaling (e.g., 1.25 for major third).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for responsive scaling (e.g., 1.25 for major third).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duyarlı ölçekleme çarpanı (ör. majör üçlü için 1.25).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für responsives Skalieren (z. B. 1,25 für große Terz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour mise à l'échelle réactive (ex. 1,25 pour une tierce majeure).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para escalado responsivo (p. ej., 1.25 para tercera mayor).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
